his background:

he is a Omatikayan/Forest Na’vi who disobeys his dad, Jake Sully, to prove that his worth to him.

He is the third youngest brother of the four of his family, the Sully’s. His older brother, who is the oldest, is Neteyam. His younger, adoptive sister, Kiri, is the second oldest. And finally, his youngest sister, Tuktirey, or Tuk is the youngest daughter and final member of the Sully family.
